pr.title: [WIP] add combined optimization, waiting for 8 gpu train

output.summary: Combines SwiGLU MLP, cosine LR, mixed int6/int8 quant, adaptive batch tuning, and sliding-window eval within a single train script.
techniques: SwiGLU gating MLP to boost capacity and gradient flow
Int6 Transformer quant (int8 embeddings) with optional STE QAT for robustness
Cosine LR plus adaptive batch/stride tuning alongside sliding-window evaluation
